MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-13-2015 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2015 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Verified First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-14-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS H. COHEN AND LYNN COHEN'S Motion For Leave To File Verified First Amended Complaint is granted. No opposition filed. COURT SIGNS ORDER ALLOWING PLAINTIFFS TO FILE A FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Denise Doucette, CSR #5963 (302/EHG)
